query: How is the technology division performing?
final_answer:
The technology division demonstrated strong performance in Q3, as evidenced by several key financial and operational metrics. Infosys reported a broad-based performance with $4,939 million in Q3 revenues, representing a sequential growth of 1.7% and a year-on-year growth of 6.1% in constant currency [59c3002d-86d0-4a61-90fd-62cc6ef196bb]. The company achieved a 0.6% sequential revenue growth and a 0.2% expansion in adjusted operating margin, alongside large deal wins totaling $4.8 billion and robust adjusted free cash generation of $965 million in a seasonally weak quarter [47b2856f-6445-4946-8122-82c743ec8c06]. Reported IFRS operating margin was 20.0%, with an adjusted operating margin of 21.0% [0517b946-c7c4-4a31-a268-86a5fdd92988]. Additionally, Infosys highlighted its differentiated value propositions in enterprise AI as a driver for higher market share and client recognition [0517b946-c7c4-4a31-a268-86a5fdd92988].

Caveat: There is an ambiguous metric reported as '25 grew at 2.8% year on year in constant currency.' The lack of clarity regarding what '25' refers to creates a gap in fully linking this figure to the other financial metrics provided [0517b946-c7c4-4a31-a268-86a5fdd92988].
